# Architecture Overview – Cuentas por Pagar (CXP-GHCopilot-Sonnet46)
**Generated by:** GitHub Copilot – Claude Sonnet 4.6 | **Date:** 2026-06-17

## System Summary

Sistema greenfield de Cuentas por Pagar (Accounts Payable) que gestiona el ciclo de vida completo de facturas de proveedores desde su registro hasta el pago efectivo, con trazabilidad completa e integración con ERP y sistema bancario.

## Architecture Style

**Layered API Architecture** — Experience → Business → Domain → Support

```
React SPA
    │
    ▼
[EXPERIENCE] accounts-payable-exp-api  (BFF / RBAC)
    │
    ├──► [BUSINESS] invoice-management-api    (BIAN: AccountsReceivable)
    │         ├──► [DOMAIN] invoice-lifecycle-api  (state machine + audit)
    │         └──► [SUPPORT] erp-integration-api   (supplier validation)
    │
    └──► [BUSINESS] payment-management-api   (BIAN: Disbursement)
              ├──► [DOMAIN] invoice-lifecycle-api  (state transitions)
              ├──► [SUPPORT] banking-integration-api (payment orders + webhooks)
              └──► [SUPPORT] erp-integration-api   (accounting entries)
```

## API Landscape (6 APIs)

| API | Layer | BIAN Alignment | Decision |
|-----|-------|----------------|---------|
| accounts-payable-exp-api | Experience | N/A (BFF) | Create |
| invoice-management-api | Business | AccountsReceivable (adapted) | Create |
| payment-management-api | Business | Disbursement (adapted) | Create |
| invoice-lifecycle-api | Domain | AccountsReceivable (adapted) | Create |
| erp-integration-api | Support | FinancialAccounting (reference) | Create |
| banking-integration-api | Support | FinancialGateway (reference) | Create |

## Invoice State Machine

```
PENDING → APPROVED → SCHEDULED → PAID (terminal)
   │           │           │
   ▼           ▼           ▼
REJECTED   CANCELLED   CANCELLED
(terminal)  (terminal)  (terminal)
```

## Key Architecture Decisions

| ADR | Decision |
|-----|---------|
| ADR-001 | REST/JSON + URI versioning for all layers |
| ADR-002 | PostgreSQL (ACID) for all persistent data |
| ADR-003 | OAuth2/OIDC + RBAC (ANALYST, MANAGER, TREASURER) |
| ADR-004 | Finite State Machine for invoice lifecycle |
| ADR-005 | Webhook-based banking integration with HMAC-SHA256 + idempotency |

## NFR Summary

| Concern | Decision |
|---------|---------|
| Performance | < 300ms SLA, 500 concurrent users |
| Security | OAuth2/OIDC, TLS 1.2+, mTLS (banking), RBAC |
| Observability | OpenTelemetry + Prometheus + Structured JSON logging |
| Reliability | Retry (exp. backoff, max 3) + circuit breakers + idempotency keys |
| Compliance | Full audit trail – ISO 27001 / SOX readiness |

## External Integrations

| System | Purpose | Pattern |
|--------|---------|---------|
| ERP | Supplier validation + ledger posting | REST + OAuth2, retry + circuit breaker |
| Banking System | Payment execution + confirmation | REST + webhooks, mTLS, HMAC-SHA256 |

## BIAN Alignment

- **Standard:** BIAN Release 14
- **Adoption level:** Semantic alignment (no direct contract adoption)
- **Primary Service Domains:** AccountsReceivable, Disbursement
- **Secondary Service Domains:** FinancialAccounting, ContractorandSupplierAgreement, FinancialGateway
- **Gate status:** PASS
